creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Created attachment 190865
libreoffice6.patch v3

Here's 6.0.1 with shebangfix, libqxp00, system cppunit.

The pdfium comment is kind of a note that we might like to have pdfium built in the future…

BTW, stage-qa complains about unstripped libraries under lib/libreoffice/program.

This is the commit that removed distro-pack-install-strip: https://github.com/LibreOffice/core/commit/0ba869fc5c13a29599fda7eb976b2e7959706e04

Looking at the Arch Linux PKGBUILD, they are just using distro-pack-install and not stripping anything…
